## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on Webstacks' content strategy, performance, and upcoming tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/-2gG3HXr1TU8H1gp7Anvx_tofSUXogDE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Recent performance dip noted; Devon to investigate potential technical issues or search volume fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/-2gG3HXr1TU8H1gp7Anvx_tofSUXogDE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [10 bottom-of-funnel articles in progress, to be published by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/-2gG3HXr1TU8H1gp7Anvx_tofSUXogDE?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [New content ideas identified from document review; Devon to prioritize next batch](https://fathom.video/share/-2gG3HXr1TU8H1gp7Anvx_tofSUXogDE?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Internal linking strategy discussed; team to leverage new site architecture for improved interlinking](https://fathom.video/share/-2gG3HXr1TU8H1gp7Anvx_tofSUXogDE?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)

## Topics

### Performance Review

  - [Recent dip in performance metrics observed](https://fathom.video/share/-2gG3HXr1TU8H1gp7Anvx_tofSUXogDE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Potential causes: technical issues, search volume fluctuations, or AI content impact](https://fathom.video/share/-2gG3HXr1TU8H1gp7Anvx_tofSUXogDE?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Devon to check Ahrefs (refreshes Fridays) for rankings and conduct SEO audit](https://fathom.video/share/-2gG3HXr1TU8H1gp7Anvx_tofSUXogDE?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Aida noted similar fluctuations on another account; rankings increased but search volume decreased](https://fathom.video/share/-2gG3HXr1TU8H1gp7Anvx_tofSUXogDE?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [US holiday on Monday (Presidents' Day) may affect rankings/volume](https://fathom.video/share/-2gG3HXr1TU8H1gp7Anvx_tofSUXogDE?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Content Production Update
